reviews.review_title: STOP RANDOMLY BANNING OR KICKING PEOPLE
reviews.review_description:
So there was that one admin called hi when I first joined the game ever I got from tutorial I got instantly kicked by him. second time when I  rejoin the game I accidentally went into the same Forest lobby and he told me to change my name which I did and after that he told his friend he could still just kick me if he wants to you and that's what he did. Then I join the game again and I was just trying to normally play the game and what a coincidence I joined the same lobby again and again got kicked. 
So stop kicking people for no reason

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: I literally just got this game and it says i'm banned for emoting in infection. Whatever that means. Beastly, if you can unbann me i will change this review. I think it is that it has to do with my ban from v67. How it happened was there were these fortnite emotes you could do and i did kt in an infection lobby and nobody told me it was bad and this kid named fbi said to put his hand where his hand was at and then he pulled out the stick and i got banned for 366 hours🖕
